top_signals.title: Five people arrested over claims of fraud in UK local elections
top_signals.summary: Greater Manchester Police launches probe after reports surrounding ‘concerns about candidates’ in St Peter’s ward
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asteroid traces found in Japan may be linked to extinction of dinosaurs
top_signals.summary: The discovery of traces of an asteroid in Hokkaido is the first-ever confirmation of such traces in Japan, according to the announcement from the team of Japanese researchers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
